positioning: A self-guided practice app for social anxiety that helps users plan tiny real-world social reps and log what actually happened.
avatar: Android users who struggle with social anxiety, avoidance, overthinking, group chats, meetings, plans, phone calls, and everyday social reps.
pain_scenes: standing outside a cafe rehearsing whether to go in
watching your name hover over a group chat typing indicator then disappearing
building an exit plan before you arrive anywhere
pretending to check a shelf so you do not have to say hi
letting a phone ring out while already deciding the excuse
knowing exactly what you want to say in a meeting and saying none of it
desired_outcomes: showing up without needing confidence first

visual_lane.style: pixel-art editorial scene backgrounds, lively but moody, saturated deep colors, symbolic through place not devices, anxious but hopeful
scene_pool: library aisle with saturated window light
park bench under amber evening sky
rooftop skyline with deep cherry clouds
